issues.detail: The skill lacks explicit error handling steps and edge case coverage in examples.

scenarios.name: durable-object-counter
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes the wrangler init, compatibility_date, Durable Object class, binding, Env interface, and fetch handler, but omits ctx.waitUntil(); Response A lacks most required elements.

scenarios.name: workers-ai-kv-cache
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items, missing only Cache-Control and ctx.waitUntil, while Response B lacks several key requirements such as wrangler init, compatibility_date, Env interface, and ctx.waitUntil.
